title: artocarpus annulatus
intro: Artocarpus annulatus, also known as the Bael fruit tree, is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its numerous medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Artocarpus annulatus include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and capsules, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
